---
title: "![](images/icons/icon_11.png){.title-icon} Outcomes"
subtitle: "Extract outcome dates and censoring — filtered to your cohort"
date: last-modified
---

::: {.callout-warning}
**Under development.** Structural outline — to be expanded. The pattern is the same as in [Phase 9 — Hospital contacts (LPR)](09b_udtraek_fra_lpr.qmd), now filtered to your cohort.
:::

Your outcome is typically **the date of the first event** after index — a diagnosis (LPR), death (DODSAARS) or emigration (VNDS, often censoring). You extract each as its own table with `pnr` + date, filtered to the cohort.

## The pattern

```r
cohort_pnrs <- unique(readRDS("datasets/full_cohort.rds")$pnr)

# Example: first dementia diagnosis after index (outcome)
outcome <- open_dataset("path/to/lpr_diag/") %>%
  rename_with(tolower) %>%
  filter(pnr %in% !!cohort_pnrs) %>%          # ONLY your cohort
  # ... join to lpr_adm for date, filter on diagnosis codes (see Phase 9) ...
  collect() %>%
  group_by(pnr) %>% arrange(event_date) %>% slice(1) %>% ungroup()   # first event

saveRDS(outcome, "datasets/extract_outcome.rds")
```

- **Censoring:** date of death from DODSAARS (`d_dodsdto`) and emigration from VNDS (`indud_kode == "U"`) — see [Overview of registers](15d_register_reference.qmd).
- **One outcome variable = one column = one `.rds` file**, joined in [Phase 12](11_data-manipulation.qmd).

## See also
- [Phase 9 — Hospital contacts (LPR)](09b_udtraek_fra_lpr.qmd) — the diagnosis pattern in detail
- [Phase 12 — Assemble and prepare the dataset](11_data-manipulation.qmd) — join outcomes to the cohort
